[CRC 7.103(C) AND PROBATE CODE SECTION 1023.] (2) A CERTIFIED COPY OF THE LETTERS ISSUED WITHIN 60 DAYS TO THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE DECEASED HEIR'S ESTATE MUST BE FILED. (3) NOTICE MUST BE GIVEN TO (OR WAIVED BY) THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF DECEASED HEIR'S ESTATE (ONCE HE IS APPOINTED). (4) NO ALLOWANCE OR REJECTION OF THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM APPEARS TO HAVE BEEN FILED YET. [PROBATE CODE SECTION 9250(B).] DEADLINE FOR PROVIDING THE EXAMINER COURTESY COPIES IS 6/10/25. ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Berge appeared by zoom for Susan Johnson (petitioner).

Mr. Berge stated that he is unable to do anything at this point, that this estate is based on the conclusion of the father's estate which is in Santa Clara County and that he thinks the father's estate will close in about 60 days. Status on close of estate is continued to October 29, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for approval of a report on status of administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
